description: Initial dashboard view of the Askable platform showing a list of research studies.
frame_description: A table of studies is visible with columns for Title, Type, Status, Quota, Closing date, Created date, and Created by. A sidebar on the left contains navigation links.

description: User clicks on the 'Closing date' column header to sort the studies.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Closing date' header in the studies table.

description: The list of studies is re-sorted based on the closing date.
frame_description: The rows in the studies table shift to a new order.

description: User hovers over the 'Create new' button in the sidebar.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the '+ Create new...' button in the left sidebar.

description: User clicks the 'Create new' button.
frame_description: The '+ Create new...' button is activated.

description: A dropdown menu appears with options for different study types.
frame_description: A vertical menu is now visible next to the sidebar, listing options like 'Interview study' and 'Unmoderated study'.

description: User hovers over the 'Interview study' option in the dropdown menu.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Interview study' item in the open menu.

description: User selects 'Interview study' from the menu.
frame_description: The 'Interview study' option is clicked.

description: Page navigates to the study setup wizard.
frame_description: The screen goes white briefly as the new page loads.

description: User clicks into the 'Study title' input field.
frame_description: The cursor is placed inside the text box under 'Give your study a title'.

description: User clears the default title and types 'TV Streaming - Discovery'.
frame_description: The text in the input field changes from the default to 'TV Streaming - Discovery'.

description: User appends ' - Discovery' to the study title in the input field.
frame_description: The 'Study title' step of the Askable booking setup is visible with the title 'TV Streaming' in the input field.

description: Cursor lingers over the 'Next' button before the user proceeds.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the black 'Next' button.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked.

description: Page navigates to the research method selection step.
frame_description: The page content updates to show options for 'Moderated' and 'Unmoderated' research methods.

description: User clicks 'Next' to move to the research method selection step.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is activated.

description: The page content clears as the next step loads.
frame_description: A blank white screen is visible during the transition.

description: Navigation to the 'Research method' step.
frame_description: The 'Research method' page is displayed with options like 'Video Call', 'In-person', and 'Online Task'.

description: User hovers over the 'In-person' research method option.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'In-person' card under the 'Moderated' section.

description: User hovers over the 'Video Call' research method option.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Video Call' card.

description: User selects 'Video Call' as the research method.
frame_description: The 'Video Call' card is clicked.

description: The 'Video Call' card is highlighted with a blue border.
frame_description: The 'Video Call' card now has a blue selection border.

description: User clicks 'Next' to proceed to the device requirements step.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked.

description: Navigation to the 'Device' step.
frame_description: The 'Device requirements' page is displayed.

description: User clicks 'Next' to proceed to the tool selection step.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked.

description: Navigation to the 'Tool' step.
frame_description: The 'Tool' selection page is displayed, featuring 'Askable Sessions'.

description: User selects 'Askable Sessions' as the research tool.
frame_description: The 'Askable Sessions' card is clicked.

description: The 'Askable Sessions' card is highlighted and the sidebar updates with tool details.
frame_description: The card is highlighted and the 'Your chosen tool' sidebar is populated.

description: User clicks 'I want to use a third party tool' to expand more options.
interaction_target: I want to use a third party tool
frame_description: The link text is clicked.

description: The list of third-party tool options expands below the link.
frame_description: Logos for Zoom, Lookback, Microsoft Teams, etc., appear on screen.

description: User clicks 'Next' to proceed to the quota step.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked.

description: Navigation to the 'Quota' step.
frame_description: The 'Quota' page is displayed with an input field for participant count.

description: User clicks the quota input field.
frame_description: The cursor clicks inside the input field containing '12'.

description: User changes the participant quota from '12' to '5'.
frame_description: The value in the input field changes to '5'.

description: User clicks 'Next' to proceed to the session format step.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked.

description: Navigation to the 'Session format' step.
frame_description: The 'Session format' page is displayed with options for 'Individual Interviews' and 'Focus Group'.

description: User selects 'Individual Interviews' as the session format.
frame_description: The 'Individual Interviews' card is clicked.

description: User clicks 'Next' to proceed to the session duration step.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked.

description: Navigation to the 'Session duration' step.
frame_description: The 'Session duration' page is displayed with a dropdown set to '45 mins'.

description: User clicks 'Next' to proceed to the participant selection step.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked.

description: Navigation to the 'Participant selection' step.
frame_description: The 'Participant selection' page is displayed with 'Hand picking' and 'Automated' options.

description: User selects 'Hand picking' for participant selection.
frame_description: The 'Hand picking' card is clicked.

description: User clicks the "Next" button to proceed from the participant selection step.
frame_description: The user is on the "Participant selection" page with "Hand picking" selected.

description: Navigation to the audience sourcing selection page.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the participant selection page to the audience panel selection page.

description: User clicks 'Next' to move forward from participant selection.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked.

description: User hovers over the Askable Panel option, considering it.
frame_description: The user is viewing the two sourcing options: "Askable Panel" and "Send a link to your list".

description: User moves cursor to hover over the alternative sourcing option.
interaction_target: Send a link to your list
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the right-hand sourcing option.

description: User clicks Next with "Askable Panel" selected.
frame_description: The "Askable Panel" option is selected, and the user clicks the "Next" button at the bottom.

description: Navigation to the participant location configuration page.
frame_description: The page content updates to show the location input field and a map.

description: User types "United States" into the location search field.
frame_description: The user is entering text into the "Location" input box.

description: Autocomplete suggestions dropdown appears.
frame_description: A list of locations including "USA" and "United States" appears below the input field.

description: User selects the "United States" option from the dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the first item in the suggestion list.

description: Location tag added and map updated.
frame_description: The input field clears, a "United States" tag appears, and the map displays the US.

description: User proceeds to the next step.
frame_description: The user clicks the "Next" button after setting the location.

description: Navigation to the demographic filters page.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the demographic filters configuration page.

description: User scrolls down the demographic filters page.
frame_description: The page content moves upwards as the user scrolls.

description: User clicks Next without adding specific demographic filters.
frame_description: The user clicks the "Next" button at the bottom of the demographic filters page.

description: Navigation to the custom screener creation page.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the custom screener page.

description: User initiates adding a new question.
frame_description: The user clicks the button to start adding a new screener question.

description: Question type selection menu appears.
frame_description: A menu with options like "Multiple choice" and "Short answer" opens.

description: User chooses the multiple choice question type.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the "Multiple choice" option in the menu.

description: Multiple choice question form appears.
frame_description: A new form with fields for "Screener question" and "Answers" is displayed.

description: User begins typing the question text: "Which best descri".
frame_description: Text is being entered into the screener question input box.

description: User types the screener question: 'Which best describes you habits for how you interact with TV streaming services?'
frame_description: Multiple Choice screener question modal is open over the Custom Screener page.

description: User types the first answer option: 'I don't use them at all'
frame_description: User is filling out the answer options in the Multiple Choice modal.

description: User types the second answer option: 'I use them a few times per week'
frame_description: User continues filling out answer options.

description: User types the third answer option: 'I use them daily'
frame_description: User continues filling out answer options.

description: User types the fourth answer option: 'I use them multiple times per day'
frame_description: User finishes filling out the four answer options.

description: User clicks the 'Save' button.
frame_description: The 'Save' button in the Multiple Choice modal is clicked.

description: The Multiple Choice modal closes and the question is added to the screener list.
frame_description: The Custom Screener page now shows the newly created question.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button below the screener question list is clicked.

description: Page navigates to the 'Your Timezone' section.
frame_description: The 'Your Timezone' page is displayed.

description: User clicks 'Audience' in the sidebar.
frame_description: The user interacts with the sidebar navigation.

description: Page navigates back to the 'Custom screener' section.
frame_description: The Custom Screener page is displayed again.

description: User clicks '+ Add another custom question'.
frame_description: The user initiates adding a second screener question.

description: Question type dropdown menu appears.
frame_description: A menu with 'Multiple choice', 'Short answer', and 'Copy from other study' is visible.

description: User clicks on 'Short answer' to add a new question.
frame_description: The user is on the 'Custom screener' page and has opened the '+ Add another custom question' menu.

description: The 'Short answer' modal appears.
frame_description: A modal titled 'Short answer' is displayed over the page.

description: User selects 'Short answer' from the dropdown.
frame_description: The 'Short answer' option is selected in the menu.

description: Short Answer question modal opens.
frame_description: The Short Answer modal is displayed on screen.

description: User types 'What is the name of your favourite TV show that you're watching right now?' into the question field.
frame_description: The user is typing into the 'Screener question' field in the modal.

description: User types the screener question: 'What is the name of your favourit'
frame_description: User is typing into the Short Answer modal as the video ends.

description: User clicks 'Save' to add the short answer question.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Save' button in the bottom right of the modal.

description: The modal closes and the question is added to the screener list.
frame_description: The modal disappears and the new question is listed on the main page.

description: User clicks to add another question.
frame_description: The user clicks the '+ Add another custom question' button.

description: User selects 'Multiple choice' question type.
frame_description: The user selects 'Multiple choice' from the dropdown menu.

description: The 'Multiple Choice' modal appears.
frame_description: A modal titled 'Multiple Choice' is displayed.

description: User types 'Which TV streaming service are you using most right now?' into the question field.
frame_description: The user is typing into the 'Screener question' field in the multiple choice modal.

description: User types 'Netflix' as the first answer option.
frame_description: User types 'Netflix' into the first answer field.

description: User types 'Stan' as the second answer option.
frame_description: User types 'Stan' into the second answer field.

description: User types 'Disney+' as the third answer option.
frame_description: User types 'Disney+' into the third answer field.

description: User types 'Prime Video' as the fourth answer option.
frame_description: User types 'Prime Video' into the fourth answer field.

description: User marks all answer options as eligible by clicking the checkmark icons.
frame_description: The user is clicking the checkmark icons next to each answer option.

description: User clicks 'Save' to add the multiple choice question.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Save' button in the modal.

description: The modal closes and the multiple choice question is added to the list.
frame_description: The modal disappears and the question list updates.

description: User scrolls down the page.
frame_description: The page content moves upwards as the user scrolls.

description: User clicks 'Next' to proceed to the next step.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button at the bottom of the 'Custom screener' page.

description: Page navigates to 'Additional Info' -> 'Your Timezone'.
frame_description: The page content changes to the 'Your Timezone' section.

description: User scrolls down the page.
frame_description: The user scrolls down on the 'Your Timezone' page.

description: Click on 'Additional Info' in the sidebar
frame_description: The user is on the 'Custom screener' page and clicks 'Additional Info' in the left sidebar.

description: Page navigates to the Timezone settings under Additional Info
frame_description: The page content updates to show the 'Your Timezone' section.

description: User clicks 'Next' on the timezone page.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button on the 'Your Timezone' page.

description: Click 'Next' on the Timezone page
frame_description: The user clicks the black 'Next' button below the timezone selection.

description: Page navigates to the Description section
frame_description: The page content updates to show the 'Description' section with text areas for short and full descriptions.

description: Page navigates to 'Additional Info' -> 'Description'.
frame_description: The page content changes to the 'Description' section.

description: User types 'Do you watch TV on streaming services?' into the short description field
interaction_target: Short description of who you're looking for (Required)
frame_description: The user types the question into the first text area on the page.

description: Click 'Next' on the Description page
frame_description: The user clicks the black 'Next' button at the bottom of the page.

description: Page navigates to the Additional Instructions section
frame_description: The page content updates to show the 'Additional instructions for confirmed participants' section.

description: Click 'Next' on the Additional Instructions page
frame_description: The user clicks the black 'Next' button.

description: Page navigates to the Contacts section
frame_description: The page content updates to show the 'Contacts' section with organizer and facilitator details.

description: Click 'Next' on the Contacts page
frame_description: The user clicks the black 'Next' button.

description: Page navigates to the Legal & privacy section
frame_description: The page content updates to show the 'Legal & Privacy' section.

description: Click 'Next' on the Legal & privacy page
frame_description: The user clicks the black 'Next' button.

description: Page navigates to the Session Times calendar
frame_description: The page content updates to show a calendar view for scheduling sessions.

description: User adds a session on Wednesday 25th, 9:00am - 9:45am
frame_description: A blue session block appears on the calendar for Wednesday 25th at 9:00am.

description: User adds a session on Wednesday 25th, 10:00am - 10:45am
frame_description: A second blue session block appears on the calendar for Wednesday 25th at 10:00am.

description: User adds a session on Wednesday 25th, 11:00am - 11:45am
frame_description: A third blue session block appears on the calendar for Wednesday 25th at 11:00am.

description: User adds a session on Thursday 26th, 9:00am - 9:45am
frame_description: A blue session block appears on the calendar for Thursday 26th at 9:00am.

description: User adds a session on Thursday 26th, 1:00pm - 1:45pm
frame_description: A blue session block appears on the calendar for Thursday 26th at 1:00pm.

description: User adds a session on Friday 27th, 9:00am - 9:45am
frame_description: A blue session block appears on the calendar for Friday 27th at 9:00am.

description: User adds a session on Friday 27th, 10:00am - 10:45am
frame_description: A blue session block appears on the calendar for Friday 27th at 10:00am.

description: Click 'Next' on the Session Times page
frame_description: The user clicks the black 'Next' button at the bottom left.

description: Page navigates to the Review & Submit page
frame_description: The page content updates to show a summary of the study setup for final review.

description: User scrolls down to review the study setup
frame_description: The user scrolls through the 'Study Summary' page.

description: Click 'Submit study'
frame_description: The user clicks the black 'Submit study' button at the bottom of the summary.

description: Page navigates to the study's participants list
frame_description: The page content updates to show the 'All participants' list for the newly created study.

description: User scrolls down the participants list
frame_description: The user scrolls through the participants page.

description: Click 'Settings'
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Settings' icon/link in the top right area of the page.

description: Page navigates to the study settings
frame_description: The page content updates to show the 'Study setup' settings.
